categories.description: Sent to the primary guardian (for minors) or the athlete directly (for adults) when their Athlete row is first created. Includes onboarding checklist link + emergency-contact-request nudge + consent-recording nudge.
Sent to the guardian who recorded consents + to admin for compliance visibility. Includes the specific consents recorded + effective date + (when workflow entitlement on) expiry date.
Sent at 30 / 14 / 7-day pre-expiry thresholds when the tenant carries athlete_consent_workflow entitlement. Includes the specific consents nearing expiry + the re-consent workflow link.

Sent to the primary guardian when the athlete crosses an age-group boundary (birthday drift or AgeGroup bounds mutation). Informational — guardians know their child has aged up. Opt-in — some guardians don't need every age-group flip.

Sent to the athlete + primary guardian on the 18th birthday. Explains that prior consents (recorded by guardian) have expired + the adult athlete now records their own. Cannot-opt-out — compliance-critical.
Sent to guardian + safeguarding_officer + coach team when an athlete transitions to paused. paused_reason is redacted to non-safeguarding recipients. Cannot-opt-out.
Celebratory. Sent to guardian + admin + coach team when an athlete graduates.
Sent to admin + coach when an athlete withdraws. Guardian receives a separate confirmation via the withdrawal-initiated flow. withdrawal_reason redacted to non-HR recipients.
